mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_user_info ( corpid, unionid, create_time, admin_vid, sex, mobile, corp_full_name, acctid, avatar, corp_name, english_name, realname, vid, mail, ownername, user_id, nickname, position, corp_desc, corp_logo, uuid ) VALUES ( #{corpid}, #{unionid}, #{createTime}, #{adminVid}, #{sex}, #{mobile}, #{corpFullName}, #{acctid}, #{avatar}, #{corpName}, #{englishName}, #{realname}, #{vid}, #{mail}, #{ownername}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{position}, #{corpDesc}, #{corpLogo}, #{uuid} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_user_info SET corpid = #{corpid}, unionid = #{unionid}, create_time = #{createTime}, admin_vid = #{adminVid}, sex = #{sex}, mobile = #{mobile}, corp_full_name = #{corpFullName}, acctid = #{acctid}, avatar = #{avatar}, corp_name = #{corpName}, english_name = #{englishName}, realname = #{realname}, vid = #{vid}, mail = #{mail}, ownername = #{ownername}, user_id = #{userId}, nickname = #{nickname}, position = #{position}, corp_desc = #{corpDesc}, corp_logo = #{corpLogo}, uuid = #{uuid} WHERE id = #{id}
update wx_user_info set is_del=1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wx_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} and is_del=0 limit 1;
SELECT * FROM wx_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND corpid = #{corpId} and is_del=0 limit 1;
SELECT * FROM wx_user_info WHERE uuid = #{uuid} and is_del=0 limit 1;
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO wx_user_info ( corpid, unionid, create_time, admin_vid, sex, mobile, corp_full_name, acctid, avatar, corp_name, english_name, realname, vid, mail, ownername, user_id, nickname, position, corp_desc, corp_logo, uuid ) VALUES
( #{item.corpid}, #{item.unionid}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.adminVid}, #{item.sex}, #{item.mobile}, #{item.corpFullName}, #{item.acctid}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.corpName}, #{item.englishName}, #{item.realname}, #{item.vid}, #{item.mail}, #{item.ownername}, #{item.userId}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.position}, #{item.corpDesc}, #{item.corpLogo}, #{item.uuid} )
